name: PKL LEX
about: PKL LEX is an indoor golf and pickleball venue located in Lexington, Kentucky. It features 9 indoor CushionMaster courts, including 6 regulation-sized and 3 large Championship courts, alongside golf simulator bays equipped with tour-level TrackMan iO technology. The facility is open daily from 6:00 AM to midnight and caters to players of all ages and skill levels, offering both court rentals and simulator access. It also partners with Country Boy Brewing, providing a full bar and an extensive food menu.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level TrackMan iO technology provides an elevated indoor golf experience
Year-round play on iconic courses regardless of weather
Variety of court options from regulation to championship-sized
On-site Country Boy Brewing with 24 unique brews on tap

food_and_drink.notes: Extensive menu featuring high-end pub food, signature BBQ, and smoked meats
24 unique brews on tap from Country Boy Brewing, package beer to-go available

simulator_hardware.notes: Tour-level golf simulator with ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue mentions they will have paddles available for sale/rent and apparel for purchase, but does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided for the golf simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue features Country Boy Brewing with 24 unique brews on tap and an extensive food menu, suggesting no outside food or drinks are allowed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time to complete 18 holes on the simulators.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue states it caters to players of all ages and skill levels, but does not provide specific details about child-friendly amenities or policies.
